org_maturity.interpretation: Mid-maturity startup. Has product metrics but informal processes.

agility_signal.interpretation: High agility — product-led team iterating quickly.

signals: IT role is a blocker not a partner
stakeholder_alignment.interpretation: Moderate alignment. IT and product teams not yet coordinating on solution.

signals: aha moment defined as specific event
data_maturity.interpretation: Good data discipline. Key metrics already tracked and quantified.

signals: no mention of documented onboarding steps
process_discipline.interpretation: Moderate process discipline. Current process is a known pain but not formally documented.

technology_fluency.interpretation: High tech fluency. Team understands the technical problem clearly.

calibration_notes: Include quantified ACs with specific metrics (data_maturity 7.0)
Flag IT coordination as a stakeholder risk
hitl_trigger_reason: Stakeholder alignment score 6.0 — IT role is unresolved blocker. Human confirmation required.

approval_log.note: Example artefact — approved for documentation purposes
